arguments.description: keys_from_context A comma-separated string listing the keys to extract values from the provided dictionaries in the input. The extracted values will be mapped to the headers in the order provided. append
arguments.name: Either a JSON or list of lists. This argument is mandatory.
When set to True, appends the new content to the existing grid content instead of overwriting it.
